system.description:
These implanted devices duplicate the effects of sensor systems that go beyond the human horizons of perception. The auger array functions as a full auspex with enhanced capabilities.

Usage: Requires concentration and a Half Action to use. Grants a +20 bonus to Awareness Tests and allows Tech-Use Tests to spot things not normally detectable to human senses alone (invisible gases, nearby bio-signs, ambient radiation). Standard range is 50m, though walls more than 50cm thick and certain shielding materials can block the scanner.

Exceptional Craftsmanship: Allows re-rolls on Perception-based Tests when using the auger array's functions. This includes Awareness Tests and Tech-Use Tests made to detect things with the array.
